subject: Pikachu — the canonical Pokémon mascot; yellow electric mouse creature in a leaping pose with lightning effects
description: A small yellow creature with large round dark eyes, circular red cheek patches, pointed ears with black tips, and a lightning-bolt shaped tail is shown in a dynamic leaping pose with its mouth open wide. Bright lightning or electrical energy radiates outward in the background, rendered in yellow and white. The composition is energetic and joyful, centered on the creature mid-leap. The flavor text references a plan to gather many Pikachu to power an electric plant — this card carries an implicit labor/resource-extraction subtext.
foreground: Yellow electric creature mid-leap, mouth open, red cheek patches visible, lightning-bolt tail
background: Bright yellow-white field with radiating lightning energy effects
emotion: excited, energetic, ready for battle — leaping with open mouth
